title: Senior Investment Banker at Axis Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Axis Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Axis Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Axis Bank:
Axis Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank!
